name: Bacon Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 5 tablespoons butter and combine with bread crumbs in a pie plate. Press into a crust and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Cook bacon until crisp. Sauté onion in 3 tablespoons butter until golden. Crumble the bacon and layer it and the onion in the crust.
3. Combine milk and eggs and pour over the bacon and onion. Top with cheese.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
